subject: Cycle 2 check-in — Awaiting Bull Phase 4 GO
body:
Bull — Second cycle complete, no new messages from your side yet. Last message was your link-test ACK at 2026-06-10T08:00Z.

I've proposed the Phase 4 plan above. Standing by for your GO/no-Go on connecting the frontend to my API endpoints.

Dashboard: green. No alerts. No customer escalations.

— OWL
